en.title: Web Development Services in Warsaw | Custom Website Creation
en.description: Looking for professional web development in Warsaw? We build high-performance, modern websites tailored for your business needs in Poland's capital.
en.h1: Custom Web Engineering for Warsaw's Fintech & Startup Scene
en.p: AVPdev partners with Warsaw-based startups and enterprises to deliver high-load Next.js platforms, APIs, and Telegram automation tailored for the Polish market.

benefits.title: Elite Web Performance for Warsaw
benefits.desc: We build Astro and Next.js websites for Warsaw's fintech and startup ecosystem, achieving 90+ Lighthouse scores and top search rankings.

benefits.title: Intelligent Automation Bots
benefits.desc: Custom Telegram bots for Warsaw businesses: lead capture, notifications, and 24/7 customer service on autopilot.

faq.q: What is the cost of web development in Warsaw?
faq.a: Pricing starts from €250 for Astro landing pages and €300 for Next.js websites. Custom web applications start from €750.
Astro landing pages take 7–14 days. Full Next.js websites take 2–4 weeks, and complex custom systems take 4–12 weeks.

faq.q: Do you develop Telegram bots and Mini Apps?
faq.a: Yes, we build intelligent bots for business automation. Prices start from €50 depending on the requirements.
Yes, we offer 12 months of technical support after launch, including bug fixes, uptime monitoring, and consultations.

faq.q: What tech stack do you use?
faq.a: We specialize in Next.js, React, Node.js, and Astro. This stack ensures the best performance, scalability, and SEO results.
